[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, monochrome-style image shows a white cat facing the camera with another dark figure partially visible on the right, and text overlaid across the bottom.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a white cat with half-closed eyes, dark oval eyes, and a black nose centered near the lower middle of its face, with visible whiskers and short fur texture.

Setting:
The background is unclear and appears to be indoors or a shaded indoor area, with no distinct setting details visible.

Visual Details:
The image is low-resolution and heavily stylized in grayscale. The cat’s face fills most of the frame, angled straight toward the viewer, with soft lighting and slightly blurred edges. On the right side of the frame, a dark, out-of-focus shape suggests another animal or object partially cropped from view. A thick, white, bold text overlay with a black outline appears near the bottom.

Visible Text:
Aduh Kamu ini

Practical Summary:
The image shows a white cat in a close-up portrait view looking toward the camera. There is overlaid text reading “Aduh Kamu ini” near the bottom of the image.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

Aduh Kamu Ini

# Structured Version

- **Aduh Kamu Ini**

# Notes

- None.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
